description_long: This object is a vintage manual typewriter, featuring a robust black metal body with a slightly sloped front housing circular, raised keycaps arranged in a classic typewriter layout. The keys are metallic with dark tops and white lettering, set into a recessed keyboard area. Above the keys, a metallic typebar mechanism is visible, leading up to a cylindrical platen roller and a paper support at the rear. The sides reveal mechanical levers and knobs for carriage return and paper adjustment, while the back displays the full width of the platen and the carriage assembly. The overall design is utilitarian and industrial, with a matte black finish and metallic accents, evoking early-to-mid 20th-century office equipment.
description: A vintage black manual typewriter with round metallic keys, a prominent typebar mechanism, and a cylindrical platen roller at the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard with round keys and the typebar mechanism above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sloped keyboard, side levers, and the cylindrical platen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the length of the platen roller and the carriage assembly.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the keyboard profile, carriage return lever, and side mechanisms.
